## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what happened.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run command '...'
2. Type '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages).

## Environment

- TCAI version: [e.g. v6.0.0]
- Windows version: [e.g. Windows 11 23H2]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.9]
- Environment: [e.g. diskless internet cafe, physical machine, VM]

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or log excerpts.
